pattern: Pickup time is fixed at the total unit count, so the only choice is travel: each truck need only drive as far as the last house holding its type.
hints: Every unit of garbage costs one minute no matter which truck, so that part of the answer is just the total number of characters.
A truck wastes no time driving past the last house that has its type, so find that last index per type.
Sum all garbage lengths for pickup, then for each of the three types add the prefix travel sum up to the last house containing that type.

edge_inputs.description: a type only at house zero needs no travel
last house empties one type early

stress.description: random houses with random garbage assortments and travel costs
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(2, size)
    garbage = []
    for _ in range(n):
        L = rng.randint(1, 10)
        garbage.append(''.join(rng.choice('MPG') for _ in range(L)))
    travel = [rng.randint(1, 100) for _ in range(n - 1)]
    return [garbage, travel]
